t_ch: 我会常来的！
t_en: I'll be coming often!

t_ch: 嗯，嗯嗯！我帮你问问。
t_en: Okay! I'll ask for you.

t_ch: 嗯，嗯嗯！我现在就去帮你问问看。
t_en: Okay! I'll go ask for you right now.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，列车上的星际和平播报，我可以打开一下吗？「老铁」好像有些好奇…
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can I turn on the Interastral Peace Broadcast on the Express? Old Mettle seems curious about it...

t_ch: 「老铁」喜欢听新闻？
t_en: Old Mettle likes to listen to the news?

t_ch: 星际和平播报…原来是专门播放新闻的广播吗？这岂不是正对「老铁」的胃口。
t_en: So the Interastral Peace Broadcast... specifically broadcasts the news? That's exactly what Old Mettle likes.

t_ch: 别看这兵器还年轻，但心态已经十分老成了，平日里很喜欢关注各类热点新闻。
t_en: This weapon may be young, but he's already very mature. He likes to keep up with the all the latest news.

t_ch: 你你你你在跟谁说话！
t_en: Wh—Who are you talking to?

t_ch: 朋友啊，喏，就在你面前。
t_en: My friend, he's right in front of you.

t_ch: 别跑呀，我开玩笑的！你见过的，「老铁」——它是我的兵器，也是我的好伙伴。
t_en: Don't run away! I'm just kidding! You've met Old Mettle — he's my weapon, and my good friend.

t_ch: 说来可能会有些令人难以置信。自铸剑起，我便能听到各类兵器的心声。
t_en: I know it's hard to believe, but ever since I forged this sword, I've been able to hear the thoughts of all sorts of weapons.

t_ch: 记得刚和「老铁」见面时，我们都不太服气对方…它说我脾气差，我嫌它长得丑。
t_en: I remember when Old Mettle and I first met, we weren't very accepting of each other... He said I had a bad temper, and I thought he was ugly.

t_ch: 那现在呢？
t_en: What about now?

t_ch: 它说我剑技超群，我说它冠绝古今。也算是…十分认可彼此了，对吧！
t_en: He says my swordsmanship is outstanding, and I think he's a master both in the past and present. So you could say we completely approve of each other now!

t_ch: 你们说得都对！
t_en: You're both right!

t_ch: 所以！你不仅觉得我脾气差，还觉得它长得丑？
t_en: So, not only do you think I have a bad temper, but you also think he's ugly?

t_ch: 罢了，这不重要。毕竟我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
t_en: Forget it, it's not important. Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.

t_ch: ——老铁也这么说。
t_en: Old Mettle says so too.

t_ch: 值得一提的是：我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
t_en: The only thing worth saying is: Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.

t_ch: 好香的味道！
t_en: That smells so good!

t_ch: 好、好香的味道！会在哪里呢，是列车上的厨房么……
t_en: That smells so, so good! Where is it coming from? Is it coming from the kitchen on the Express?

t_ch: 嘿！在找什么呀？
t_en: Hey! What are you looking for?

t_ch: 哇啊！怎么从背后吓人！我可差点就拔剑了！
t_en: Ah! You can't scare people like that! I almost drew my sword!

t_ch: 话说…{NICKNAME}，闻到了吗？列车上有一股甜甜的，很浓郁的奶香糕点气息。
t_en: Anyway, {NICKNAME}, do you smell that? There's a sweet and rich smell of milk pastries here on the Express.

t_ch: 厨房是个神秘的地方！
t_en: The kitchen is a very mysterious place!

t_ch: 这么神秘的话…不妨带我去看上一看，让我多领会领会它的神秘？
t_en: If it's that mysterious... could you let me take a look, so I can better understand its mysteriousness?

t_ch: （甜甜的，有着浓郁奶香气息的糕点，吃下去一定很幸福吧……）
t_en: (A pastry with this sweet, rich milk flavor must taste so good...)

t_ch: 这么令人沉溺其中的甜香，我曾在小时候闻到过一次。
t_en: I've only smelled something this sweet and enticing once, when I was little.

t_ch: 出名的朱明糕点，大多以咸甜和烟熏口味为主，所以我对这种纯粹的甜香毫无抵抗之力……
t_en: The pastries that the Zhuming is known for are mostly salty-sweet or smokey in flavor. So there's no way I can resist this kind of pure sweetness.

t_ch: 可惜那会儿我正急着赶去工造司，当时正逢剑器冷却的关键阶段，容不得丝毫闪失。待剑器彻底冷却，我回头再去寻那香甜的气息，却早已散去了。
t_en: Unfortunately, at the time, I was hurrying to the Artisanship Commission. My sword was at a crucial point of cooling off, and I couldn't afford to make any mistakes. When the sword had completely cooled, I went back to find the sweet scent, but it had already disappeared.

t_ch: 难道是新开的糕点铺打烊了？
t_en: Maybe it was a new bakery that closed for the night?

t_ch: 我那时也这么认为。但后来…爷爷带我找遍了朱明仙舟的糕点铺子，也没能找见类似的味道。
t_en: I thought so too at the time. But later... when Grandpa took me around the Zhuming's bakeries, we didn't find the same scent anywhere.

t_ch: 兜兜转转，最终买了几十盒朱明特制的咸甜风味糕点，吃了数月之久。
t_en: After wandering around a bit, we finally bought a few dozen boxes of the Zhuming's special salty-sweet pastries and ended up munching on them for several months.

t_ch: 直到今天！列车上的甜香又唤醒了我对奶香糕点的记忆，所以……
t_en: Until today! The sweet smell on the Express has awakened my memories, so...

t_ch: 巨无霸帕姆帕姆派！送给你！
t_en: Then here's a Giant Pom-Pom Pie for you!

t_ch: 真、真的吗！这么大一份，都给我了？！那我就…不客气了！
t_en: R—Really? All this, for me!? Then... I'll take it!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你可太懂我了！待我回了朱明，定当给你准备一份「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」送给你。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you know me too well! When I go back to the Zhuming, I'll make sure to get you a Giant Smoked Jujube Cake.

t_ch: 能媲美帕姆帕姆派的巨无霸谢礼…「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」，就是你啦！
t_en: A gift comparable to Pom-Pom Pie... Giant Smoked Jujube Cake it is then!

t_ch: 一颗——两颗——三颗……
t_en: One... two... three...

t_ch: 一颗——两颗——三颗——
t_en: One... two... three...

t_ch: 不知道每颗星球上，会有多少个武备库……
t_en: I wonder how many armories and arsenals there are on each of these planets...

t_ch: 我也不知道。
t_en: I have no idea.

t_ch: 其实我只是在自言自语…这个问题太难回答了。
t_en: Actually, I was just talking to myself... I don't think this question can be answered.

t_ch: 问问怀炎将军？
t_en: Why don't you ask General Huaiyan?

t_ch: 早就问过啦。爷爷说他不知道。
t_en: I already asked him. He said he doesn't know.

t_ch: 小时候，他和我说如果世界上有人知道答案，那就只有「帝弓司命」了。
t_en: When I was little, he told me that if there was anyone in the world who knew the answer, it would be the Reignbow Arbiter.

t_ch: 不瞒你说，世间的「不配剑器者」众多，如果他们毫无精进剑技之心，我确实想把他们手中的神兵利器一一取回，存放在镕兵剑炉中…但我也知道这样的愿望，总有些不切实际。
t_en: To tell you the truth, there are many unworthy swordsmen in the world. If they lack the will to improve at swordsmanship, then I will have to take back every single one of their marvels of weaponry and put them in the Molten Remains... But I understand that wish is a little unrealistic.

t_ch: 是时候好好练习球棒秘技了！
t_en: Time to practice my baseball techniques!

t_ch: 的确。我瞧你体质特殊，是个可造之材。以你的实力，匹配球棒不成问题。
t_en: For sure. You have a unique constitution and a lot of potential. With your strength, wielding a baseball bat is no problem at all.

t_ch: 目前剑炉里的神器数量…
t_en: Right now the number of divine weapons in there...

t_ch: 嗯…好像很久没有记录了，自入焰轮铸炼宫受训算起，数量应当是三百一十二柄。
t_en: Mm... I haven't kept track in a while. Since I started training at Flamewheel Forge, the number should be three hundred and twelve.

t_ch: 不过比起计数，我只愿那些神兵利器都有珍惜他们的主人，而非单纯被蛮力驱使。
t_en: But really, I just want those marvels of weaponry to all have masters who treasure them rather than wield them with only brute strength.

t_ch: 说起来，列车上有专门存放兵器的地方吗？
t_en: Speaking of which, does the Express have a place specifically for storing weapons?

t_ch: 别、别担心，我只是想和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
t_en: Ah, don't worry. I just want to talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!

t_ch: 我只是想看看那些兵器，和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
t_en: I just want to take a look at the weapons and talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!

t_ch: 三月徒弟最近……
t_en: Lately, my apprentice March...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，三月近来可好？可有偷懒？剑艺有没有更上一层楼？
t_en: How has March been lately, {NICKNAME}? Has she been slacking off? Has her swordsmanship improved?

t_ch: 她很好！练剑从不偷懒！
t_en: She's been great! She never slacks off!

t_ch: 哦？真的？可我方才听帕姆列车长说，她时不时睡到午时才起床。
t_en: Oh, really? But I just heard Pom-Pom say that she sometimes sleeps in until noon.

t_ch: 她很好！我经常被她打败！
t_en: She's been great! She often defeats me!

t_ch: 嗯！你说得很好，可她的双剑却不是这样说的。
t_en: Huh! What you're saying is quite different from what her dual swords have been saying to me.

t_ch: 唉…虽说徒弟已经学到了些本事，但我这当师父的，终究还是放心不下啊！
t_en: Even though my apprentice has learned a thing or two, as a master, I can't stop worrying!

t_ch: 师父别担心，我来监督她！
t_en: Master, don't worry, I'll supervise her!

t_ch: 总有种你会更加纵容她的预感。
t_en: I have a feeling you're going to let her off even more.

t_ch: 云璃师父好负责！
t_en: Master Yunli is so responsible!

t_ch: 咳咳，这只是…身为师父应尽的职责而已！
t_en: I'm merely performing the duty required of a master.

t_ch: 列车行遍诸界，难免有遭遇困境的时候。多身技能，总归是能多份保障。
t_en: The Express travels to so many worlds, it's hard to avoid running into difficult situations. Having more skills can give you more protection.

t_ch: 所以，我要给三月和你制定一份修炼计划表！
t_en: So I want to draw up a training schedule for you and March!

t_ch: 为啥只有我俩？！
t_en: Why just us two!?

t_ch: 列车组的前辈身手不凡，这我早有耳闻。丹恒阁下本就是列车护卫，列车长…列车长这么可爱我不忍心！
t_en: I've heard that the Crew's senior members are extremely skilled. Dan Heng is already the Express' guard, and the conductor... the conductor is too cute to ask to train!

t_ch: 好了，我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
t_en: Alright, I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!

t_ch: 我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
t_en: I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!

t_ch: 这石块…
t_en: This stone...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这些石块…是不是你们正在找的那种？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?

t_ch: 正是！
t_en: Yes!

t_ch: 太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
t_en: Awesome! Then... please take them.

t_ch: 「石块」…
t_en: Stones...

t_ch: 虽然看上去五彩斑斓的，但应该还是石块，对吧？所以这是不是你们正在找的那种？
t_en: Even though they look all bright and colorful, they're still stones, right? Aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?

t_ch: 正是！
t_en: Yes!

t_ch: 太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
t_en: Awesome! Then... please take them.

t_ch: 谢谢你能邀请我登上列车！以后有机会，记得来朱明做客！
t_en: Thank you for inviting me onto the Express! If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Zhuming!

t_ch: 爷爷给我的零花钱肯定够我们大吃大喝一顿！不…三顿！
t_en: With the allowance Grandpa gave me, we'll be able to have a huge meal! No, three huge meals!

t_ch: 以后有机会，记得来朱明仙舟做客！
t_en: If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Xianzhou Zhuming!

t_ch: 繁星密布，却也稀疏……
t_en: The stars are numerous, and yet widely scattered...

t_ch: 繁星密布，却也稀疏……
t_en: The stars are numerous, and yet widely scattered...

t_ch: 是恩公呀！小女子这厢打扰了。初次登上列车，本应与各位打声招呼，不想才行两步，便被这窗外星辰吸引，看入了迷。还请见谅。
t_en: Benefactor! My apologies... I should have immediately greeted everyone as soon as I boarded on this initial visit of mine to the Express, but before I had even taken two steps I became engrossed by the stars outside the windows. Please forgive me.

t_ch: 一下就找到了最佳观星点！
t_en: You found the best stargazing spot in no time!

t_ch: 群星无垠，远眺辨不清任何一颗的来处。但身处其中，才发现它们也是四处坐落，各有栖所。
t_en: The stars are endless. It isn't easy to discern their origins when gazing from afar, yet when one is amidst them, one finds that they all have a spot in the sky... a home of their own.

t_ch: 宇宙深幽，想来独独一颗星星也无法照亮四周，聚落一处才能看见彼此…更能被我们观见。
t_en: With the universe being so vast, I imagine that one solitary star is not enough to illuminate its surroundings. Only when gathered in one place can they see each other... and be seen by us.

t_ch: 你说，它们可是因为被彼此照亮，才识得自己也是星星，也能荧荧闪烁？
t_en: Do you think they only realize that they're stars and capable of radiance after experiencing another's illumination?

t_ch: 或许自诞生那一刻起便知道了。
t_en: Maybe they've known since the moment of their birth.

t_ch: 那小女子便要厚着脸皮再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
t_en: Then I'll shamelessly invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.

t_ch: 小女子再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
t_en: I'll invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.

t_ch: 群星间的品茗，令人回味……
t_en: Having this beverage surrounded by the stars brings back memories...

t_ch: 入口虽苦…唔，回甘也有些酸涩…这咖啡跟罗浮风味大相径庭啊……
t_en: It tastes bitter at first... Ugh, and it has a rather sour aftertaste... This coffee is vastly different to the kind on the Luofu...

t_ch: 罗浮也有咖啡？
t_en: There's coffee on the Luofu?

t_ch: 还以为你在品茶呢。
t_en: I thought you were drinking some tea.

t_ch: 我瞧它汁色浓郁，品尝起来个中滋味也沉浮多变…能否请教恩公，它是谁做的呀？
t_en: I see that it has a deep and rich color, and it tastes as though it contains layers of various flavors... Benefactor, may I ask who concocted this?

t_ch: 姬子亲作，你值得拥有。
t_en: Himeko made it herself, because you're worth it.

t_ch: 原来是姬子小姐的手艺！三月姑娘方才还提醒小女子不要轻易尝试，但我仍放不下好奇心……
t_en: So it is Miss Himeko's work! Miss March was just telling me not to try her drinks haphazardly, but I could not contain my curiosity...

t_ch: 虽然味道有些…但也算是尝鲜啦。这偌大寰宇果真还有许多新鲜事物在等待小女子游历见识。
t_en: The taste was a bit... hmm, but it was still a novel experience. Indeed, this endless universe still has many more wonders waiting for me to experience.

t_ch: 虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
t_en: Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.

t_ch: 虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
t_en: Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.

t_ch: 好可爱的帽子……
t_en: Such a cute hat...

t_ch: 方才在三月姑娘房里看到了不戴帽子的列车长，忍不住多待了会儿……
t_en: I just saw the conductor without their hat on in Miss March's room, and I couldn't help but stand there a little longer...

t_ch: 如今回到车厢一瞧，感觉戴上帽子的列车长也变得更可爱了。还有三月姑娘的照相机，姬子小姐的发饰也十分精妙。
t_en: Now that I'm back here, I feel the conductor looks even cuter with their hat on. Miss March's camera and Miss Himeko's hair accessories are all very intricate, too.

t_ch: 我对列车组的审美很有信心！
t_en: I have great faith in the Crew's tastes!

t_ch: 是呀，列位恩公的服饰也极为好看。
t_en: Indeed, benefactor. Your crew's outfits are all very stunning.

t_ch: 之前小女子总被窗外的星辰美景吸引，不逛不知道，今日仔细一瞧才发现，尽管穿行宇宙已久，列车却没有一丝风尘仆仆的感觉。
t_en: Before, I was constantly engrossed in the scenery outside the window. Now that I've walked through the Express, I realize that it doesn't seem dusty or travel-worn at all, despite its long journey through the universe.

t_ch: 反而干净温馨，像家一样。就连眼前这盆绿油油的盆栽看着都让人格外心仪，看来列车长真是在日日照顾。
t_en: It is clean, comforting, and feels like a home. Even this vibrant plant here is a delight to look at. I can tell the conductor has carefully tended to it day after day.

t_ch: 喜欢的话可以送给你。
t_en: You can have this plant if you want.

t_ch: 多谢恩公心意！可小女子觉得，它是因为在列车上，与大家一同游历群星才这般美丽。
t_en: Thank you for the kind thought, benefactor! However, I feel that it only gained such beauty because it has travelled through the stars with everyone here on the Express.

t_ch: 你怎么也看上了这座盆栽。
t_en: Why are you interested in this plant, too?

t_ch: 想来是它葱绿得太过美丽，才这么有人气。
t_en: I imagine its popularity lies in its vibrant liveliness and beauty.

t_ch: 难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
t_en: Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...

t_ch: 难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
t_en: Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...

t_ch: 很久很久以前……
t_en: Once upon a time...

t_ch: 听说在很久以前，有将山包一般的原牛养大，赶往其他世界的巨人无名客，也有在终年下宝石雨的国度采摘品鉴奇石的无名客……
t_en: I heard that once upon a time, there were giant Nameless who raised cattle as big as the hills and herded them to other worlds, and there were also Nameless who harvested and evaluated marvelous crystals from worlds that rained gemstones...

t_ch: 开拓者们去往天外，让某个世界平平无奇的资材成了其他星辰令人惊叹的奇货。恩公听说过这个故事么？
t_en: The Trailblazers ventured beyond the sky and turned the most commonplace materials in one world into precious wonders of another. Have you heard this story before, benefactor?

t_ch: 似乎没有。
t_en: I don't think so.

t_ch: 我也是从姬子小姐处听说的，光是听着，小女子的内心便甚是澎湃。
t_en: I only heard it from Miss Himeko myself. Just listening to it made my heart fill with excitement.

t_ch: 你心动了？
t_en: Are you moved by this story?

t_ch: 不怕恩公笑话，小女子从姬子小姐处听到这段时确实心生澎湃。
t_en: To be completely honest, I did get very excited when I heard it from Miss Himeko.

t_ch: 看来也如过去相识之人所说，我有些经商的天赋呢。
t_en: It seems like I do have some natural talent in business, just like my past acquaintances said.

t_ch: 去吧，成为宇宙商人！

t_ch: 若能抓住这种机遇，恩公或许也能小赚一笔呢。
t_en: If you can seize this kind of opportunity, you might find yourself with quite the windfall!

t_ch: 我知道的你也知道……
t_en: You know what I know...

t_ch: 我知道的你也知道，我不说的你也不说……
t_en: You know what I know, and you won't say what I won't say...

t_ch: 怎么成谜语人了！

t_ch: 并非小女子自言自语，这是一位名叫巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉的谜语大师所言之语。在恩公看来，此话何解呢？

t_ch: 谜底就是谜面。

t_ch: 虽然还是有些不解，但书里也说那些谜语人惯爱破坏语言的确定性，想来他们并不倚赖用文字作答。
t_en: I don't fully understand it, but the books do say that The Riddlers love to destroy the certainty of language. I imagine they would not answer with words.

t_ch: 让恩公见笑了。只是小女子也算是从他人言语中重构了自我的认知，所以才有如此联想。
t_en: I've made a fool of myself, haven't I? However, I essentially reconstructed my own cognition from the words of others, which is why I entertained that thought.

t_ch: 人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。

t_ch: 人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。
t_en: People's memories and pasts are complicated indeed.

t_en: Hehe, Sparxie really dotes on her fans.

t_ch: 我不是你粉丝……
t_en: I'm not your fan...

t_ch: 话别说这么死嘛，我还有许多惊喜呢~
t_en: Don't be so sure, I still have plenty of surprises for you~

t_ch: 火花粉丝团专属贴纸、火花主题湿巾、火花的可动签名照……
t_en: Exclusive Sparxie fan stickers, Sparxie-themed wet wipes, and a motion autograph photo of Sparxie...

t_ch: 更有火花专属语音机器人——「火宝」！支持自由定制任意场景的语料，你是第一位幸运用户！
t_en: And there's more! Sparxie's exclusive voice bot, "Spark-bot"! It lets you freely customize dialogue for any scenario, and you're the very first lucky user!

t_ch: 「火宝」，真正人性化的智能语音
t_en: Spark-bot, the truly humanlike intelligent voice assistant

t_ch: 更懂生活，更懂列车~
t_en: Understands life better, understands the Express even more~

t_ch: 「火宝」，帮我定个闹钟
t_en: Spark-bot, set an alarm for me.

t_ch: 好的，已设定晚上十二点的闹钟，需要我提供物理叫醒服务吗？
t_en: Understood. Alarm set for midnight. Would you like me to provide a physical wake-up service?

t_ch: 嘻嘻，是不是很心动？
t_en: Hehe. Tempting, isn't it?

t_ch: 原来是在内测
t_en: So it's still in beta.

t_ch: 一举两得嘛，肯定还能再优化一下。
t_en: Two birds with one stone... There's definitely still room for improvement.

t_ch: 有什么反馈可以随时和我说。稍等一会，定制礼盒马上送到~
t_en: If you have any feedback, please don't hesitate to let me know. Just a moment, your custom gift box will be delivered soon~

t_ch: 嘻嘻，有什么反馈可以随时和我说。稍等一会，定制礼盒马上送到~
t_en: Hehe, if you have any feedback, please don't hesitate to let me know. Just a moment, your custom gift box will be delivered soon~

t_ch: 动动小手，点点小心心~
t_en: Don't be shy, drop a like~

t_ch: 演员的自我修养……
t_en: An Actor Prepares...

t_ch: 我的下一首主打歌……
t_en: My next lead single...

t_ch: 第二期列车联动……
t_en: Express Collaboration, second issue...

t_ch: 咖啡…饮料…好喝……
t_en: Coffee... Drinks... So tasty...

t_ch: 专属粉丝福利……
t_en: Exclusive fan perks...

t_ch: 众星有如密织的琳琅，万千历史亦在此间流转。从这里看，倒也别有一番趣味……
t_en: The stars shimmer like a finely woven tapestry of gems, and countless histories flow within. From here, it does have a certain charm...

t_ch: 列车确实是观星宝地
t_en: The Express truly is the perfect place for stargazing.

t_ch: 爻老板在想什么？
t_en: Madam Yao, what are you thinking about?

t_ch: 在那风云激荡的时代，游云天君的目光也曾如这般投向群星。
t_en: In that turbulent era, the Sacrosancts once gazed upon the stars just like this.

t_ch: 星空沉寂已久，诸神相争的盛景却一直在暗中酝酿。也许很快，银河就会发生翻天覆地的巨变…想想就让人心潮涌动。
t_en: The stars have been silent for ages, yet the gods' clash brews in secret. Soon, the cosmos may change beyond recognition... The thought alone is thrilling.

t_ch: 银河会发生什么？
t_en: What will happen to the cosmos?

t_ch: 说破了不就没意思了么？敬请期待吧。
t_en: Wouldn't it spoil the fun if I told you? Just wait and see.

t_ch: 我不关心银河
t_en: I don't care about the cosmos.

t_ch: 不失为一种态度，我喜欢。
t_en: That's a mindset I can appreciate.

t_ch: 说起观星，总有些热衷此道的人信奉天意难违，因此习惯仰头瞻望，把卜辞奉为圭臬，多么无趣。
t_en: Speaking of stargazing, there are always those who believe fate is unchangeable. They make a habit of gazing upward, treating divinations as sacred truth. How dull.

t_ch: 喏，此刻正有一对双星同转，是难得的吉兆。
t_en: Look, there's a pair of twin stars orbiting each other... A rare and lucky omen.

t_ch: 可倘若没有人力付出，这些星象不过空谈罢了。
t_en: But without human effort, all these omens are nothing but talk.

t_ch: 喏，此刻正有一对双星同转，是难得的吉兆。
t_en: Look, there's a pair of twin stars orbiting each other... A rare and lucky omen.

t_ch: 可倘若没有人力付出，吉凶不过空谈罢了。
t_en: Without human effort, weal and woe are nothing but talk.

t_ch: 你来得正好，正好有个问题。
t_en: You came just in time, I happen to have a question.

t_ch: 你们的列车长帕姆，是不是一位高超的牌技大师？
t_en: Is your conductor, Pom-Pom, a master of card games?

t_ch: 当然，知道厉害了吧！
t_en: Of course! Pretty impressive, right?

t_ch: 原来帕姆还有这种技能！
t_en: I never knew Pom-Pom had a skill like this!

t_ch: 原来你也不知道，果然这列车上还有许多秘密。
t_en: So you didn't know either. Looks like this Express still holds plenty of secrets.

t_ch: 刚刚一时兴起，我与列车长玩了一会仙舟的牌戏。
t_en: I got the urge just now and played some Xianzhou cards with the conductor.

t_ch: 它的牌技显而易见地稚嫩，连规则也是从我这现学，一上牌桌却纵横莫测，路数诡谲，倒叫我一不小心输了一把……
t_en: Their play was clearly clumsy at first, even when learning the rules. But once at the table, they were so unpredictable and cunning I ended up losing a round...

t_ch: 且它赢了就跑，推诿称列车长事务繁忙，不愿再战。
t_en: After they won, they ran off, claiming they had important duties and couldn't play another round.

t_ch: 可能是新手保护期
t_en: Maybe it's just beginner's luck.

t_ch: 真是不小心输的？
t_en: Was it really an accident that you lost?

t_ch: 我已许久未遇到像样的对手了。不为胜败，就想和这位列车长再切磋两下。
t_en: It's been a long time since I've met a worthy opponent. It's not about winning or losing... I just want another match with this conductor.

t_ch: 这样，我请人来处理列车上的杂事，你去帮我请列车长回来。
t_en: Here's the plan: I'll have someone handle the Express's chores, so you go and ask the conductor to come back.

t_ch: 待我净手后再来一局，我必全力以赴。
t_en: I'll wash up and come back for another round. This time, I'll give it my all.

t_ch: 待我净手后再来一局，我必全力以赴。
t_en: I'll wash up and come back for another round. This time, I'll give it my all.

t_ch: （爻老板似乎在忙……）
t_en: (Madam Yao seems to be busy...)

t_ch: 至于曜青军队的胜负前景，叫玉阙太卜将二相乐园一同纳入演算……
t_en: As for the Yaoqing Army's prospects of victory, have the Yuque's Master Diviner include Planarcadia in the extrapolation as well...

t_ch: …打小报告？哼，随他们去吧。这些年，他们的反对还少么？
t_en: Tattling on me? Hmph, let them. It's not like they haven't opposed me enough over the years.

t_ch: 昆冈君那边的诉求，让丹鼎司去商谈吧，有结果了向我汇报。
t_en: Have the Alchemy Commission handle Mons Grandis's requests. Keep me updated on the results.

t_ch: 星际和平公司「市场开拓部」的接洽工作，由商会主导，搞清楚他们背后的目的……
t_en: Have the merchant guild take the lead in handling communications with the IPC's Marketing Development Department, and find out their true intentions...

t_ch: 诶，你来了。不好意思，刚刚还在工作。
t_en: Oh, you're here. Sorry, I was working.

t_ch: 这就是一心百用？
t_en: So this is what multitasking looks like?

t_ch: 我习惯了多线处理各类事务，这还不算忙的。
t_en: I'm used to juggling several things at once... This doesn't even count as busy.

t_ch: 要不您先忙？
t_en: Maybe you should get back to your busy schedule?

t_ch: 忙？这还不算忙。
t_en: Busy? This doesn't even count as busy.

t_ch: 好像听到了机密……
t_en: Sounds like I just overheard something confidential...

t_ch: 那就跟我回玉阙走一趟…开个玩笑。
t_en: Perhaps you should accompany me back to the Yuque... Just kidding.

t_ch: （还是给爻老板一些空间吧……）
t_en: (Give Madam Yao some space...)

t_ch: （做仙舟将军果然不容易……）
t_en: (Being a Xianzhou general really isn't easy...)

t_ch: （还是给爻老板一些空间吧……）
t_en: (Give Madam Yao some space...)

t_ch: （做仙舟将军果然不容易……）
t_en: (Being a Xianzhou general really isn't easy...)

t_ch: 发明「闭嘴」的人倒算得上是个天才。
t_en: Whoever came up with "Shush" really was a genius.

t_ch: 英雄所见略同！
t_en: Great minds think alike!

t_ch: 这从何说起？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 他刚刚讲了个「添肌将军」的笑话，妙趣横生，我下次定要当着飞霄本人的面再讲给她听。
t_en: He just told a "sly fox" joke. It was brilliant. Next time, I'm telling it straight to Feixiao herself.

t_ch: 而且，作为智械而言，他的调饮品味相当不错。
t_en: And for an Intellitron, his taste in drinks is surprisingly refined.

t_ch: 柠檬汁酸味宜人，辅以碎冰和清凉的薄荷叶，倒比丹鼎司调制的祛乏药茶更使我神清气爽。
t_en: The lemon juice's pleasant tang, with crushed ice and mint, refreshes me even more than the Alchemy Commission's fatigue-relief tea.

t_ch: 嗯…要不我也请工造司打造一个拥有类似功能的？
t_en: Hmm... Maybe I should ask the Artisanship Commission to craft one with similar functions?

t_ch: 就叫「莫言」吧！
t_en: Let's call it "Wordless"!

t_ch: 尽在不言中，妙啊。难道你也是天才？
t_en: All understood without words. Brilliant. Could it be that you're a genius too?

t_ch: 我亲自把他送过去
t_en: I'll send him there myself.

t_ch: 要不是算到它与列车仍有缘分未尽，我还真想请它去仙舟逛逛。
t_en: If I hadn't foreseen his lingering bond with the Express, I really would have wanted to invite him to visit the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 等回到玉阙，我一定会想念这些笑话的……
t_en: Once I'm back on the Yuque, I know I'll miss these jokes...

t_ch: 等回到玉阙，我一定会想念这些笑话的……
t_en: Once I'm back on the Yuque, I know I'll miss these jokes...

t_ch: 列车处处都好，只是略有些干燥……
t_en: The Express is wonderful in every way, just a little dry...

t_ch: 感觉不舒服吗？
t_en: Not feeling well?

t_ch: 需要帮助吗？
t_en: Do you need any help?

t_ch: 没事，只是习惯了湿润的空气，一时之间有些不适应。
t_en: It's nothing, I'm just used to more humid air. Takes a bit to adjust.

t_ch: 对卜者而言，护手是重中之重，正所谓「好手气」嘛。
t_en: For a diviner, hand care is of utmost importance. After all, it's all about having a "lucky hand."

t_ch: 正好我随身带了一些滋润护手的药膏，你们平日舟车劳顿，应该也会需要。
t_en: I happen to have some soothing hand balm with me. You're always traveling around, so I'm sure you could use it too.

t_ch: 感谢，很有用！
t_en: Thanks, that'll come in handy!

t_ch: 想要多少，跟我说一声就是。
t_en: Just let me know if you need more.

t_ch: 不用，我们习惯了
t_en: No need. We're used to it.

t_ch: 过了这个村，可没这个店咯。
t_en: Once this chance is gone, there won't be another one!

t_ch: 这就是玄学吗？
t_en: So this is what they call mysticism?

t_ch: 爱惜自己的双手，总是不会错的。
t_en: Taking good care of your hands is never a mistake.

t_ch: 不如我把这方子教给你，如何？说不定还能让你时来运转。
t_en: How about I share the recipe with you? It might just bring you a bit of luck.

t_ch: 材料很简单，取鳞渊泉水，加以乳木果油，并蜂蜡与波月莲子三钱，碾碎搅匀，温煮……
t_en: It's simple. Mix Scalegorge Springwater, shea butter, beeswax, and crushed Moonlotus seeds, then gently heat it...

t_ch: 不过，要想真有效果，还得加入一味来自玉阙的神秘特产…我下次配置齐全再送给你吧。
t_en: But for it to really work, you'll need one special ingredient from the Yuque... I'll bring you a full batch next time.

t_ch: 要想真有效果，还得加入一味来自玉阙的神秘特产，我下次配置齐全再送给你吧。
t_en: For it to really work, you'll need one special ingredient from the Yuque... I'll bring you a full batch next time.

t_ch: 叨扰列车，按我的习惯，总要留下些对等的礼物才好。
t_en: Since I've intruded upon the Express, it's only customary to leave a gift in return.

t_ch: 寻常的物件无非是些珠宝琳琅，不够奇特，难表心意。仙舟的特产，等你们以后来访再送不迟。
t_en: Ordinary trinkets and jewels wouldn't do, they're too common to convey sincerity. As for Xianzhou's specialties, I'll save those for your next visit.

t_ch: 不如，就让我以卜者的身份，赠你一卦？
t_en: Then, how about I give you a divination? A gift from a diviner.

t_ch: 爻老板大气，请
t_en: You're so generous, Madam Yao. Please, go ahead.

t_ch: 在这六十四卦中，我最钟爱「未济」——☲☵。
t_en: Among the sixty-four hexagrams, the one I love most is "Incomplete" — ☲☵.

t_ch: 它有两两相应，同舟共济之象，然而吉凶相伴，前路未尽，仍在不断发展——恰如我眼中的「开拓」。
t_en: It symbolizes mutual support, sharing the same boat through rough waters. Fortune and misfortune go hand in hand, the road still unfolding, much like Trailblaze itself.

t_ch: 懂了，未来还有无限可能！
t_en: I see! The future is full of endless possibilities!

t_ch: 怎么说呢。听上去像套话，但实际上，真正拥有「未来」的人并不多。
t_en: How should I put it... It sounds like a cliché, but in reality, there aren't many who truly have a future.

t_ch: 真的假的？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 这就看你怎么想的咯。
t_en: That all depends on how you see it.

t_ch: 不是很想算
t_en: I don't really feel like getting a reading.

t_ch: 趋吉避凶，其力在己不在天。你既明白这个道理，便已是手握上上签。
t_en: To seek fortune and avoid misfortune, the power lies within, not above. Knowing this means you already hold the best luck.

t_ch: 不如留给以后吧
t_en: Let's save it for another time.

t_ch: 也好。下次见面，我还期待着你能让我大吃一惊呢。
t_en: Very well. Next time we meet, I'll be looking forward to you surprising me.

t_ch: 无论遇到什么，不必过分烦忧。最后赠你一言：只管放手去做，就好。
t_en: No matter what you face, don't let worry weigh you down. One last piece of advice: go for it.

t_ch: 无论遇到什么，不必过分烦忧。最后赠你一言：只管放手去做，就好。
t_en: No matter what you face, don't let worry weigh you down. One last piece of advice: go for it.

t_ch: 众星有如密织的琳琅……
t_en: The stars shimmer like a finely woven tapestry of gems...

t_ch: 这局倒是有趣……
t_en: This turn of events is quite interesting...

t_ch: 这些事尚未办妥……
t_en: These matters still haven't been settled...

t_ch: 再来一杯柠檬汁调饮！
t_en: Another glass of lemon juice, please!

t_ch: 护手药膏……
t_en: Hand cream...

t_ch: 让我赠你一卦……
t_en: Allow me to cast a divination for you...

t_ch: 星星们的目光……
t_en: The gaze from the stars...

t_ch: 二相乐园瞬息万变，可银河的星星们却还是一如既往，在寰宇间明灭流转…一切都像是昨天发生的一样。
t_en: As temperamental as Planarcadia can be, the stars in the cosmos are as they've always been, faithful beacons of the universe... It feels just like yesterday.

t_ch: 你很怀念以前？
t_en: Do you miss the old days?

t_ch: 是啊，真希望变化少一点，时间能慢一点。
t_en: I do. I wish there were a little less change, and time could pass a little slower.

t_ch: 欢迎上车，侦探先生。
t_en: Welcome aboard, Detective.

t_ch: 有个故事怎么说的来着？逝去的人最终都会变成星星，自此高悬于寰宇，偌大的银河就是这么组成的。
t_en: How did that one story go again? Those who die will eventually become the constellations high above. That's how the great cosmos came to be.

t_ch: 如果是真的，我那些故人们，此刻应该在向我眨眼吧。
t_en: If that's really true, then... I suppose my old friends must be blinking back at me right in this moment.

t_ch: 多谢邀请，站在这里，我也能感受下无名客在星空中飞驰的日子了。
t_en: Thanks for the invitation. Being here gives me the chance to experience what it's like to soar through the cosmos like the Nameless.

t_ch: 以后请多来
t_en: I hope you'll visit more in the future.

t_ch: 想听你的故事
t_en: I want to know your story.

t_ch: 可不是我吹牛，一个琥珀纪都未必讲得完。
t_en: Not to brag, but I don't think even a whole Amber Era would be enough time for that.

t_ch: 以后我会多来打扰的，毕竟这样的机会可不多。
t_en: I'll be sure to annoy you often. Opportunities like this come only a handful in a lifetime.

t_ch: 以后我会多来打扰的，毕竟这样的机会可不多。
t_en: I'll be sure to annoy you often. Opportunities like this come only a handful in a lifetime.

t_ch: 竟然这么多门道…
t_en: Such meticulous methods...

t_ch: 没想到这里头竟然还有如此多的门道……
t_en: I didn't think there were such meticulous methods involved...

t_ch: 没想到什么？
t_en: Think what now?

t_ch: 什么门道？
t_en: What methods?

t_ch: 哦，我刚刚与你们的列车长帕姆，就不同个体的投喂方法进行了一番深刻探讨。
t_en: Oh, I just had a deep dive with Conductor Pom-Pom about the ways to feed different individuals.

t_ch: 用它的话来说，最核心的法则就是投其所好。
t_en: In their words, the golden rule is to cater to their preferences.

t_ch: 譬如讲三月小姐爱吃甜食，列车上便定期采购各个世界的特色糕点，丹恒先生对水源尤其关注，提供口味清甜的纯净水至关重要……
t_en: For example, Miss March has a sweet tooth, so the Express makes regular purchases of local desserts from different worlds. Mr. Dan Heng is especially concerned about water sources, so providing clean, refreshing water becomes crucial...

t_ch: 瞧瞧，它把你们个个养得活蹦乱跳，要是我也能这么专业就好了！
t_en: I mean, just look at you all. Every one of you is thriving under Pom-Pom's care! If only I were that professional!

t_ch: 总感觉哪里不太对…
t_en: Something feels amiss here...

t_ch: 帕姆确实把我们养得很好！
t_en: Pom-Pom feeds us well, indeed!

t_ch: 若说要投其所好…按照老白的爱好，我总不能真送它一根重金打造的黄金香蕉吧！
t_en: But going back to catering to preferences... Well, knowing Mister N, it's not like I can just toss them a banana made of solid gold!

t_ch: 你有什么建议吗？
t_en: Got any suggestions?

t_ch: 水果零食管够
t_en: Unlimited supply of fruits and snacks.

t_ch: 难搞啊。有一次我买了六百万信用点的水果囤着，结果因为卫生问题被邻居投诉了。
t_en: Oof, that's a tricky one. I once stocked up on six million credits' worth of fruits and ended up with a report from my neighbors over hygiene concerns.

t_ch: 还是得发展发展仙舟的人脉，水果还是那儿的品种最多。
t_en: I should really develop more Xianzhou connections. They have the largest variety of fruits there.

t_ch: 多让老白出门遛弯
t_en: Let Mister N out for more walks.

t_ch: 说不定可以，老白的自我管理意识那么强，一个人出去溜溜弯也不会走丢的。
t_en: That might just work. He's got great self-discipline, so he'll be fine taking a stroll alone.

t_ch: 少工作，多玩耍
t_en: Less work, more play.

t_ch: 主要是老白的自我管理意识太强了，「这个侦探事务所，离了我还存在吗？」——它的原话。
t_en: Problem is, he's got too much self-discipline. "The Detective Agency wouldn't last a day without me!" His words, not mine.

t_ch: 应该还有别的办法…听说帕姆有很多衣服，要不也给老白买几身帅气的？
t_en: There's gotta be some other way... I heard Pom-Pom has a big wardrobe. Maybe I should get something stylish for Mister N, too?

t_ch: 应该还有别的办法…听说帕姆有很多衣服，要不也给老白买几身帅气的？
t_en: There's gotta be some other way... I heard Pom-Pom has a big wardrobe. Maybe I should get something stylish for Mister N, too?

t_ch: 困了，上哪睡一觉吧…
t_en: Getting drowsy... there a place to nap around here?...

t_ch: 又困了。
t_en: Getting sleepy again.

t_ch: 列车上什么都好，就是没地方让我安稳长眠……
t_en: The Express has it all, except a place for me to rest in peace...

t_ch: 这话听起来怪怪的……
t_en: That sounds off...

t_ch: 列车上倒是还有客房
t_en: We do have spare rooms available.

t_ch: 开个玩笑，小朋友。
t_en: I'm just kidding, friend.

t_ch: 只是按照我的睡眠习惯，需要有一个制冷效果一流，隔音降噪完美，能让我陷入婴儿般沉睡的地方……
t_en: But my sleeping habits require a place with top-notch cooling and perfect soundproofing. Somewhere I can fall asleep like a baby...

t_ch: 睡列车的冰箱吧
t_en: You can take the Express's refrigerator.

t_ch: 帕姆给我看了，里面塞满了零食饮料。
t_en: Pom-Pom gave me a tour. It's stuffed with drinks and snacks.

t_ch: 来点咖啡提提神
t_en: How about some coffee?

t_ch: 是姬子女士的成果吗？怪不得你们个个都很精神。
t_en: Miss Himeko's blend? No wonder you all have energy for days.

t_ch: 我还尝试过冥想呼吸和模因催眠来减缓时间在我身上的流速，谁让凡人生命有限，我又有事情没干完。
t_en: I also tried slowing the flow of time on myself through breathing meditation and memetic hypnosis. The mortal life is short, and I still got a long list of to-dos.

t_ch: 不过性价比最高的还是睡在冰箱里——低温睡眠才能真正降低新陈代谢的速度。
t_en: But refrigerators remain the most cost-effective option. Low-temperature sleeping is the one true way to slow down your metabolism.

t_ch: 别以为我在胡说八道，还有人和我说，只要在宇宙中达到速度的极限便能追平时间，真正延缓衰老……
t_en: You think I'm pulling your leg? You know, someone else told me that once you reach maximum speed in the universe, you effectively catch up with time and actually age more slowly...

t_ch: 所以，你们星穹列车还能再加把劲儿吗？
t_en: So... care to override the safety on the Express?

t_ch: 只要在宇宙中达到速度的极限便能追平时间，真正延缓衰老……
t_en: Once you reach maximum speed in the universe, you effectively catch up with time and actually age more slowly...

t_ch: 所以，你们星穹列车还能再加把劲儿吗？
t_en: So... care to override the safety on the Express?

t_ch: 真相只有一个…
t_en: There is always only one truth...

t_ch: 此刻，一团疑云涌上了侦探的心头——
t_en: At this moment, suspicion clouds the detective's heart...

t_ch: 这一地的血污，到底是谁…在此地造下了惨绝人寰的凶案！
t_en: Who? Who is responsible for the blood-painted floors and the brutal carnage?

t_ch: 事态很严重。刚才帕姆匆匆把地板上的血迹拖掉了，还拒绝我和其他无名客围观……
t_en: The situation is dire. Pom-Pom cleaned the blood stains on the floor in a hurry, and denied requests from the rest of the Nameless to inspect the scene...

t_ch: 地板上的血手印，目测符合瓦尔特先生的手型。
t_en: The bloody handprint seemed to match Mr. Yang's size and form.

t_ch: 星穹列车谋杀案？
t_en: Murder on the Astral Express?

t_ch: 该说不说，星穹列车正是绝佳的案件发生地呐。
t_en: I hate to say it, but this is the perfect location for a crime.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生怎么样了？
t_en: How's Mr. Yang doing?

t_ch: 我看到，血滴一直从这里，滴落到他的房间。
t_en: I saw it, blood dripping from this spot, trailing all the way to his room.

t_ch: 帕姆…是凶手？
t_en: Pom-Pom... did it?

t_ch: 不排除这个可能。
t_en: That is a possibility.

t_ch: 在我们眼皮子底下将列车沾染上血污，我和老白一定会将凶手揪出来！
t_en: Desecrating the Express with blood right under our noses... Mister N and I will bring the murderer to justice!

t_ch: 侦探的豪言壮志来源于他对证据与推理的自信！瞧瞧，血迹集中于此处，想必这里就是凶案发生的第一现场，可惜附近没有目击者，但这也说明，凶手对列车非常熟悉！
t_en: The detective's bold declaration is rooted in his absolute confidence in evidence and deduction! Look closely: The bloodstains are centered around this location, suggesting that this must be the primary crime scene. Unfortunately, there are no eyewitnesses, but that also proves the murderer's familiarity with the Express!

t_ch: 以我的过往经历和敏锐的推理嗅觉，我断定，凶手就在列车之上！
t_en: Based on my experience and keen deductive senses, I am certain that the murderer is right here on the Express!

t_ch: 车门锁着，难道犯人在车底？
t_en: The doors are locked. Could the suspect be under the Express?

t_ch: 但我怎么觉得这血…很香啊！
t_en: But why does this blood... smell kinda nice?

t_ch: 会不会是阿哈干的？
t_en: Maybe Aha did this?

t_ch: 不能排除这样的可能…等等，哪里传来的味道……
t_en: We can't rule out the possibility... Wait... Wait, wait, wait! Where did that smell come from...?

t_ch: 诶，地板上还有玻璃细渣，还有摔倒的痕迹……
t_en: Huh. There are tiny glass shards on the ground, and signs of someone falling...

t_ch: 有如惊雷一瞬，灵光乍现，侦探先生终于抓住了事实的真相——
t_en: Then, as if struck by a lightning bolt of insight, a eureka of divine clarity, our detective finally grasps the truth...

t_ch: 是红酒撒了！
t_en: It's red wine that has been spilled!
Reeeed wiiiiine.
Reeeed wiiiiine.

t_ch: 押注谁好呢…
t_en: Who should I bet on...?

t_ch: 幻月游戏如火如荼地展开，想靠押注赢一把吗？
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games are in full swing. Want to try to win big with a bet?

t_ch: 我钻研各类赛事多年，对这件事最深的见解就是——
t_en: I've studied all kinds of competitions over the years, and my greatest advice for you is...

t_ch: 永远不要把所有的香蕉放在同一个冰箱里。
t_en: Don't ever put all your bananas in the same fridge.

t_ch: 所有，或一无所有！
t_en: It's all or nothing now!

t_ch: 这种赌法，只适用于不要命又好运的家伙。
t_en: That type of betting only works for the reckless and ridiculously lucky.

t_ch: 我并非赌徒。
t_en: I'm no gambler.

t_ch: 这就对咯，世上多的是十赌九输的倒霉蛋。
t_en: That's more like it. Nine times out of ten, gamblers lose.

t_ch: 从前，为了改善生活，我曾一度沉迷赛马。
t_en: I got hooked on horse racing for a time, chasing a better life.

t_ch: 马的步速、骑师的操控、开场前的走位…其实一切都有迹可循。
t_en: The horse's gait, the jockey's handling, the pre-race positioning... it all followed discernible patterns.

t_ch: 总结下来，无非是「观察、分析、推理」，这套方法可以同样运用于其他赛事分析。
t_en: In summary, it's all about observation, analysis, and deduction. The same method applies to all other competition analysis.

t_ch: 例如····，这次幻月游戏……
t_en: Such as the Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: 我是主角，全部押我。
t_en: I'm the main character, go all-in on me.

t_ch: 你押谁赢？
t_en: Who are you betting on?

t_ch: 教你一招，没有开奖前，不要向任何人透露自己的押注——
t_en: I'll give you this one for free: Never reveal your bets to anyone before the results come out.

t_ch: 不过，你要是想分析局势，随时欢迎来找我。
t_en: But, I'm always here if you fancy going over the odds.

t_ch: 教你一招，没有开奖前，不要向任何人透露自己的押注——
t_en: I'll give you this one for free: Never reveal your bets to anyone before the results come out.

t_ch: 不过，你要是想分析局势，随时欢迎来找我。
t_en: But, I'm always here if you fancy going over the odds.

t_ch: 怎么卖不出去呢…
t_en: Why won't they sell...

t_ch: 这难道没有记忆点吗？这样天才般的设计，怎么不被人欣赏？
t_en: Is this not memorable enough? I can't believe nobody appreciates this genius design!

t_ch: 我来欣赏。
t_en: I'm here to appreciate.

t_ch: 什么设计？
t_en: What design?

t_ch: 我计划售卖几款侦探事务所的周边贴补家用，结果你猜怎么着？统统滞销！
t_en: So I was planning on getting some extra cash flow going by selling some agency merch, and what do you know? Total flop!

t_ch: 回头率百分百的名侦探台词T恤，印着「真相不止一个」，「最危险的凶手，往往是最明显的那个人」…亏我想了这么久，就卖出去三件！
t_en: These are head-turner t-shirts with famous detective lines like "There is more than one truth" and "The most dangerous murderer is often the most obvious"... Ugh, what a bunch of wasted effort just for THREE WHOLE ORDERS!

t_ch: 敲一下就会印上「你很行」字样的审判锤，也只卖出去两把。
t_en: Oh and, I only managed to sell two of those gavels that print "You Got This" when you hammer them.

t_ch: 最过分的是那个陨铁打造的手…手镯，超精美的设计，同时也是实用防身器具，居然一个也没卖出去。
t_en: The worst is the Meteoric Alloy... bracelet. Exquisite design, doubles as a practical self-defense gadget... ZERO sales.

t_ch: 二相乐园人到底懂不懂欢愉？
t_en: Do people in Planarcadia really understand "Elation"?

t_ch: …要不再设计点正常的？
t_en: ...How about designing something more normal?

t_ch: 哎，艺术总要为商业牺牲，但谢谢你的建议。
t_en: Alas, art forever sacrifices itself on the altar of business, but I appreciate your advice.

t_ch: 我觉得很有趣啊！我买！
t_en: I think they're cool! I want some!

t_ch: 我就知道还是有懂行的，谢谢你的认可！
t_en: I knew someone would understand! Thank YOU for the vote of confidence!

t_ch: 这样，我送你几张事务所的折扣券当作感谢。
t_en: How about this? I'll give you a few discount coupons from the agency as thanks.

t_ch: 以后星穹列车有任何需要帮助的要事，都可以放心委托给我不死途。
t_en: If the Astral Express ever needs urgent help, you can relax and count on ol' Ashveil.

t_ch: 至于价钱，给朋友的都是友情价，再加折扣券，等于不花钱！
t_en: As for the price... well, we offer friendship discounts. Add that on top of the coupons and you've got yourselves a free deal!
